title: B.Sc Jobs 2026 – Fishery Officer and Junior Football Coach
org: Fishery Officer and Junior Football Coach
shortInfo: Meghalaya Public Service Commission (Meghalaya PSC) Recruitment 2026 for 13 posts of Fishery Officer and Junior Football Coach. Candidates with B.F.Sc. or B.Sc, Diploma, Any Graduate Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 25-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Meghalaya PSC official website mpsc.meghalaya.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: Meghalaya PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Fishery Officer and Junior Football Coach Posts
basic_details.post_name: Fishery Officer and Junior Football Coach
basic_details.short_information: Meghalaya Public Service Commission (Meghalaya PSC) Recruitment 2026 for 13 posts of Fishery Officer and Junior Football Coach. Candidates with B.F.Sc. or B.Sc, Diploma, Any Graduate Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 25-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Meghalaya PSC official website mpsc.meghalaya.gov.in.

application_fee.details: Fishery Officer: Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 27 years. Age relaxation applicable: SC/ST: 5 years (for certificate holders from Govt. of Meghalaya), Govt. Employee: No age bar (if entered service within prescribed age limit). Junior Football Coach: Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 32 years. Age relaxation applicable: SC/ST: 5 years (for certificate holders from Govt. of Meghalaya), Athlete (National Level): Up to 43 years (as per Meghalaya State Sports Policy 2019).

age_limit.maximum_age: For Fishery Officer: 18-27 years. For Junior Football Coach: 18-32 years. Age relaxation applicable for SC/ST, Govt. employees and athletes.
age_limit.age_details: For Fishery Officer: 18-27 years. For Junior Football Coach: 18-32 years. Age relaxation applicable for SC/ST, Govt. employees and athletes.
age_limit.details: Fishery Officer: Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 27 years. Age relaxation applicable: SC/ST: 5 years (for certificate holders from Govt. of Meghalaya), Govt. Employee: No age bar (if entered service within prescribed age limit). Junior Football Coach: Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 32 years. Age relaxation applicable: SC/ST: 5 years (for certificate holders from Govt. of Meghalaya), Athlete (National Level): Up to 43 years (as per Meghalaya State Sports Policy 2019).

qualification.education_qualification: For Fishery Officer: B.F.Sc. or B.Sc (Pisciculture/Fishery Science). For Junior Football Coach: Graduate in any stream with Diploma in Sports Coaching from NSNIS or equivalent, OR 10+2 with Diploma in Sports coaching from NSNIS or equivalent for medalists.
qualification.details: Fishery Officer: B.F.Sc. or B.Sc (Pisciculture/Fishery Science) from any recognized University. Junior Football Coach: (i) Graduate in any stream with Diploma in Sports Coaching from NSNIS (Netaji Subhas National Institute of Sports) - 1 year Diploma in Sports Coaching or other Institutes/University/Colleges recognized by the Govt. of India in the concerned discipline with special preference for higher medal winners at International/National/Zonal recognized championships. OR (ii) 10+2 with Diploma in Sports coaching from NSNIS (Netaji Subhas National Institute of Sports) or other Institutes/University/Colleges recognized by Govt. of India in the concerned discipline for those achievers who are medalists at International/National/Zonal recognized championships.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Fishery Officer and Junior Football Coach

salary_details.pay_scale: Fishery Officer: Level 12 of Revised Pay Structure. Junior Football Coach: Level 11 of Revised Pay Structure.
salary_details.salary: Fishery Officer: Level 12 of Revised Pay Structure. Junior Football Coach: Level 11 of Revised Pay Structure.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Meghalaya PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Meghalaya PSC recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Meghalaya PSC Fishery Officer and Junior Football Coach posts is 25th June 2026.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for Fishery Officer?
faq.answer: There are 11 vacancies available for the post of Fishery Officer in the Meghalaya PSC recruitment.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification for the Junior Football Coach post?
faq.answer: For Junior Football Coach, the minimum qualification is a Graduate degree in any stream with a Diploma in Sports Coaching from NSNIS or equivalent, or 10+2 with a Diploma for medalists.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Fishery Officer post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Fishery Officer post is between 18 to 27 years, with applicable age relaxations.

faq.question: What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 350/-.

faq.question: Are there any relaxations in the upper age limit?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST candidates, Govt. employees, and athletes as per the specific post and government rules.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Screening Test (MCQ pattern) followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: How can I apply for the Meghalaya PSC recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply online through the official Meghalaya PSC website before the last date.

faq.question: What is the salary for a Fishery Officer?
faq.answer: The salary for a Fishery Officer is as per Level 12 of the Revised Pay Structure.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.
